packages.hypothesis: The loss classifier shows mana/spell-volume failures under pressure. This imports the narrow 615 ritual lane while preserving Dawn's Truce, Teferi's Protection, High Noon, Hexing Squelcher, Storm Herd, and the three-mana ramp shell; it tests whether cast-trigger mana plus a one-shot ritual beats static red/white medallion discounts.
